name: task-runner
description: Discover Makefile targets, package.json scripts, and shell scripts in a project, then run them with live streaming output.

configSchema.label: Allowed Directories
configSchema.description: Comma-separated root directories. Tasks can only be discovered and executed inside these roots.

configSchema.label: Default Path
configSchema.description: Initial directory shown when the panel opens.

configSchema.label: Include Shell Scripts (*.sh)
configSchema.description: Discover *.sh files in the project root and ./scripts/.

configSchema.label: Task Timeout (seconds)
configSchema.description: Hard kill after this many seconds. Set 0 to disable.

configSchema.label: Max Concurrent Runs
configSchema.description: Reject new runs once this many tasks are already running.

configSchema.label: Output Buffer (KB)
configSchema.description: Per-run rolling output snapshot kept in memory for late subscribers.
